jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Toppr
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
